all.en: Good morning, distinguished guests, valued partners, and colleagues from every department.
all.zh: 各位貴賓、合作夥伴與來自各部門的同仁，早安。

all.en: Welcome to the official opening of our new Riverside Innovation Campus.
all.zh: 歡迎參加 Riverside 創新園區的正式開幕儀式。

all.en: Three years ago, this site was an empty lot near the harbor.
all.zh: 三年前，此處還是港口旁的一塊空地。

all.en: Today, it houses six hundred employees and a state-of-the-art laboratory.
all.zh: 如今，這裡容納 600 名員工以及一座先進的實驗室。

all.en: I want to thank the city council for approving our zoning request.
all.zh: 我要感謝市議會核准我們的土地用途變更申請。

all.en: Their cooperation made this twenty-month construction timeline possible.
all.zh: 他們的協助讓這 20 個月的工期得以實現。

all.en: I also thank Greenway Architects for designing such an energy-efficient building.
all.zh: 我也感謝 Greenway 建築師事務所設計如此節能的建築。

all.en: The campus runs entirely on renewable energy from rooftop solar panels.
all.zh: 園區完全使用屋頂太陽能板提供的再生能源運作。

all.en: Rainwater harvesting reduces our municipal water usage by forty percent.
all.zh: 雨水回收系統使我們的市政用水使用量降低 40%。

all.en: Inside, you will find collaborative zones and quiet rooms on every floor.
all.zh: 在室內，您會發現每個樓層都有協作區與靜音室。

all.en: We have also opened an on-site childcare center for working parents.
all.zh: 我們也設立了現場托育中心，服務在職家長。

all.en: This expansion will create two hundred new jobs over the next year.
all.zh: 此次擴建將於未來一年創造 200 個新職缺。

all.en: Most positions will go to local graduates from nearby technical colleges.
all.zh: 大部分職位將提供給鄰近技術學院的在地畢業生。

all.en: We believe long-term success comes from investing in the communities we serve.
all.zh: 我們相信長期成功來自於投資我們所服務的社區。

all.en: Our new research wing focuses on clean transportation technology.
all.zh: 我們的新研究廂房聚焦於潔淨運輸技術。

all.en: It will accelerate development of next-generation battery systems.
all.zh: 此舉將加速次世代電池系統的開發。

all.en: Pilot units are expected to roll out to customers by 2027.
all.zh: 試產機組預計於 2027 年交付客戶。

all.en: None of this would be possible without the dedication of every employee.
all.zh: 若非每位員工的奉獻，這一切都無法成真。

all.en: Please join me in giving them a warm round of applause.
all.zh: 請大家與我一同給予他們熱烈的掌聲。

all.en: After the ribbon-cutting, our chefs will serve refreshments in the lobby.
all.zh: 剪綵儀式後，主廚將於大廳供應點心。

all.en: Guided tours of the facility begin at eleven and at two.
all.zh: 園區導覽將於 11 點與 14 點開始。

all.en: Please collect a visitor badge from the reception desk before exploring.
all.zh: 參觀前請至接待櫃台領取訪客識別證。

all.en: Thank you all for sharing this important milestone with us.
all.zh: 感謝各位與我們共同見證這重要的里程碑。

all.en: Now, let us officially cut the ribbon and open the doors.
all.zh: 現在，讓我們正式剪綵並開啟大門。

all.en: The mayor has kindly agreed to assist us in this celebratory gesture.
all.zh: 市長慷慨同意協助我們進行這項慶祝儀式。

all.en: Photographers from the local press are positioned to capture the moment.
all.zh: 在地媒體攝影師已就定位準備記錄此一時刻。

all.en: We will share the official photographs on our corporate channels later today.
all.zh: 今日稍晚我們將於企業官方管道分享正式照片。

all.en: Press releases in three languages will be distributed by our communications team.
all.zh: 我們的傳播團隊將發布三種語言的新聞稿。

all.en: Customers and analysts are invited to a private reception this evening.
all.zh: 我們已邀請客戶與分析師參加今晚的私人歡迎酒會。

all.en: Tomorrow we begin a week of open house events for community visitors.
all.zh: 明日起我們將展開為期一週的社區開放參觀活動。

all.en: Schoolchildren from the district will tour the laboratory on Wednesday morning.
all.zh: 本區學童將於週三上午參觀本實驗室。

all.en: We hope these visits inspire the next generation of engineers and scientists.
all.zh: 希望這些參訪能啟發新一代的工程師與科學家。

all.en: Thank you again for your continued partnership and support throughout this journey.
all.zh: 再次感謝各位在此歷程中持續的合作與支持。

all.en: Let us now move forward together into a bright and productive future.
all.zh: 現在讓我們一同邁向光明而豐碩的未來。

all.en: Our community grants program will fund local environmental restoration projects.
all.zh: 我們的社區補助計畫將資助在地環境復育專案。

all.en: Public transport access has been improved with a new bus stop right outside.
all.zh: 新設的公車站就在門口，公共運輸接駁已大幅改善。

all.en: Bicycle parking and electric vehicle chargers are available for staff and visitors.
all.zh: 腳踏車停放處與電動車充電樁可供員工與訪客使用。

all.en: Our cafeteria sources eighty percent of ingredients from regional farms and producers.
all.zh: 我們餐廳的食材有八成來自區域農場與生產者。

all.en: Wellness facilities include a fitness center, meditation rooms, and outdoor walking paths.
all.zh: 健康設施包含健身中心、冥想室與戶外步道。

all.en: The auditorium will host quarterly innovation talks open to the local community.
all.zh: 禮堂將舉辦每季創新講座並對在地社區開放參與。

all.en: Internship programs will partner with regional universities starting this autumn.
all.zh: 實習計畫將於今年秋季起與區域大學展開合作。

all.en: Site security combines smart access controls with twenty four hour monitoring.
all.zh: 園區保全結合智慧門禁管制與二十四小時監控。

all.en: Visitor guides in multiple languages are available at the main reception desk.
all.zh: 主接待處備有多種語言的訪客導覽手冊。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming you back many times in the years ahead.
all.zh: 期待在未來的歲月中多次迎接您再度蒞臨。
